General.Name: DIT Group Ltd
General.Description: DIT Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the provision of prefabricated construction work, decoration and landscaping services in the People's Republic of China. The company also provides granting licenses, rental, and consulting services, as well as grants licenses. It also engages in the manufacture of prefabricated concrete; and sale of prefabricated construction equipment. In addition, it is involved in the investment of commercial properties located in Shandong; and development of properties. The company was formerly known as China Minsheng DIT Group Limited and changed its name to DIT Group Limited in November 2019. DIT Group Limited was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Tower 2, The Gateway,, Kowloon, Hong Kong
